scripts.dev:local-sdk: concurrently -k -n sdk,astro -c yellow,cyan "pnpm run sdk:watch" "pnpm run dev"
scripts.deploy:beta: git fetch origin && git checkout release/beta && git pull origin release/beta --no-ff --no-edit && git merge origin/master --no-ff --no-edit -m 'Merge master into release/beta for deployment' && git push origin release/beta && git checkout -
scripts.deploy:prod: git fetch origin && git checkout release/prod && git pull origin release/prod --no-ff --no-edit && git merge origin/release/beta --no-ff --no-edit -m 'Merge release/beta into release/prod for deployment' && git push origin release/prod && git checkout -
